pricing.metaDesc: Free to start. Premium ($9/mo or $79/yr) unlocks bloodwork history, re-test comparison, full tracking trends, and a coach that remembers your data.
pricing.heroSub: We don't sell supplements, so Premium isn't a markup on pills. It's the tools that turn your stack and labs into measurable progress over time.
pricing.foundingBody: Premium will be **$9/month** when billing switches on. The first {total} members lock **lifetime access for a single $79** — no subscription, ever. That's the cost of nine months, for life.
pricing.claimedLineZero: Be the first — {left} lifetime spots at $79
pricing.onListBody: Check your inbox: we'll send a secure payment link and switch on your lifetime access within 24 hours. Questions?

pricing.foundingFinePrint: One-time $79 · lifetime access · 14-day money-back · secure invoice · no card stored

pricing.freeB1: Everything to plan a great stack
pricing.checkoutNotLive: Checkout isn't switched on yet, check back shortly.
pricing.checkoutOpenError: Couldn't open checkout. Please try again.
pricing.checkoutStartError: Couldn't start checkout. Please try again.
pricing.v1t: Stop wasting money on pills that don't move your numbers
pricing.v1b: The average stack has redundant or under-dosed products. Premium tracks your labs over time so you keep what works and cut what doesn't, usually saving more than $79 in the first months.
pricing.v2t: Turn a one-off lab into a trend you can act on
pricing.v2b: A single ferritin reading is a guess. Premium saves your history and shows the re-test arc (18 → 47), so you see whether your plan is actually working.
pricing.v3b: No re-explaining your stack, your labs, your goals. Premium's coach has your full context, so the guidance gets sharper the longer you use it.
pricing.trustEyebrow: Why you can trust the recommendations
pricing.trustBody: We have no house brand and take no money from supplement makers. Premium pays for the tools, never for changing the answer. Every ingredient links to its source research so you can verify it yourself.
pricing.faq1q: What do I actually get for free?
pricing.faq1a: A lot, forever: every evidence-graded ingredient guide, the personalized quiz, stack builder, stack audit, the interaction and timing checkers, one bloodwork analysis, and 7 days of tracking. No card needed.
pricing.faq2a: The features that compound with your data: unlimited bloodwork with saved history, re-test comparison over time, full tracking trends, a coach that remembers your stack and labs, and reminders plus weekly reports.
pricing.faq3q: How does the founding offer work?
pricing.faq3a: During our founding phase, Premium is a one-time $79 for lifetime access (no subscription, ever). You enter your email, we send a secure payment link, and we switch on your lifetime access within 24 hours. Limited to the first 50 members.
pricing.faq4a: Yes. If Premium isn't for you, email hello@suppdoc.io within 14 days and we refund you in full, no questions asked.
pricing.faq5q: Do you sell your own supplements?
pricing.faq5a: No, and we never will. We have no house brand, so our recommendations have no built-in bias. Premium pays for the tools, not for pushing pills.
pricing.faq6a: No. SuppDoc is educational and evidence-graded, not a substitute for a clinician. Premium adds tools and history; it never changes the honesty of the recommendations.
pricing.faq7a: Yes. Your bloodwork and tracking data are private to your account and never sold. You can export or delete them at any time.
pricing.finalCta: Claim one of the last {left} lifetime spots →
pricing.footnote: Educational use only, not medical advice. Premium adds tools and history; it never changes the honesty of the recommendations.

quiz.metaTitle: Take the Quiz, Express or Complete | suppdoc.io
quiz.metaDesc: Get a personalised supplement stack. Choose the 2-minute Express quiz for fast goal-matched recommendations, or the 5-minute Complete quiz for deep personalization including bloodwork analysis.
quiz.metaKeywords: supplement quiz, personalised supplements, personalised supplement quiz, express supplement quiz
quiz.heroSub: Two ways in. Most people want Express, quick and accurate. Complete is for when you want every nuance considered.
quiz.expressBody: Six core questions about your goals, energy, sleep, and stress. We generate a 4-7 supplement stack instantly.
quiz.completeBody: 10+ questions on sleep, stress, symptoms, current supplements, medications, and health conditions. The deepest match our engine can produce.
quiz.notSureBody: **Take Express.** It's designed to give 90% of the accuracy in 30% of the time. You can upgrade to the Complete quiz any time.
quiz.buildDesc: Describe your goals in plain English, or pick from 200+ ingredients manually.
quiz.auditDesc: Paste what you take today. We'll find redundancies, gaps, and timing issues.
quiz.browseTitle: Prefer to browse? Free evidence-led guides
quiz.guide4: Best time to take each supplement
quiz.faq1a: Yes. Both the 2-minute Express and the 5-minute Complete quiz are free with no signup. You answer a few questions about your goals, sleep, energy, and stress, and get a personalised 4 to 7 supplement stack instantly, each pick with its dose, timing, and the evidence behind it.
quiz.faq2q: How does the quiz decide what supplements I need?
quiz.faq2a: It matches your goals and answers against an evidence-graded database of 200+ ingredients, then ranks the best fits and checks them for interactions and redundancies, so the stack you get is coherent rather than a random list.
quiz.faq3q: Which quiz should I take, Express or Complete?
quiz.faq3a: Take Express. It gives about 90% of the accuracy in 30% of the time. Choose Complete if you want to factor in current supplements, medications, health conditions, or upload bloodwork for a deeper match.
quiz.faq4a: No. suppdoc does not sell its own supplements. We recommend evidence-led options and link to trusted retailers, so the advice is not biased toward a house brand.

about.metaDesc: suppdoc.io composes personalised supplement rituals from clean, evidence-led ingredients. Built to help you understand your stack, not just sell it.
about.intro: suppdoc.io composes personalised supplement rituals from clean, evidence-led ingredients. We exist because most supplement advice is either too generic or too aggressive, and the average person deserves better.
about.pPhilosophy: Most supplement brands push a generic stack at everyone. We do the opposite: we ask you 25 thoughtful questions about your body, lifestyle, and goals, then build a small, specific stack from clean ingredients that fits your budget. Less marketing, more matching.
about.h2noSell: Why we don't sell supplements directly
about.pNoSell: We'd rather you buy proven, third-party-tested brands from trusted global retailers than from us. So instead of launching our own private label, we curate top-rated products for each recommendation, established brands like NOW Foods, Doctor's Best, Thorne, Sports Research, and Garden of Life, and link you out to retailers like iHerb and Amazon. You buy direct. We earn a small affiliate commission. Your stack stays honest.
about.pVetIntro: Every ingredient in our database meets four criteria:
about.vet1: Peer-reviewed evidence (mostly RCTs or strong observational data)
about.vet3: A reasonable safety profile at common doses
about.vet4: Available in clean forms from multiple trusted brands
about.pVetOutro: If a supplement doesn't pass all four, even if it's trendy, we don't recommend it.
about.pNot: We're not medical professionals. We don't diagnose, treat, or cure conditions. We don't replace your doctor, dietitian, or pharmacist. For any health concerns, and especially before starting supplements, talk to a qualified clinician. Our recommendations are educational.
about.ctaSub: The quiz takes you from question to ritual.

contact.metaDesc: Get in touch with the suppdoc team. Questions about your stack, partnerships, or press inquiries, we reply within one business day.
contact.sub: Questions about your stack, feedback on the quiz, partnerships, or press inquiries, we reply within one business day.
contact.card1Desc: Quiz feedback, ritual support, anything else.
contact.helpTitle: Looking for help with your stack?
contact.helpSub: Most questions are answered in our help centre. If not, email us above.

help.metaDesc: Frequently asked questions about suppdoc.io's quiz, supplement recommendations, affiliate links, and safety guidelines.
help.sub: Common questions about the quiz, your stack, and how suppdoc.io works.
help.s1q1: How long does the quiz take?
help.s1a1: About 3 minutes. We ask 10 short questions about your goals, lifestyle, body, and budget. You can save progress and come back later, answers are stored in your browser.
help.s1a2: No. Your answers stay on your device. We don't collect emails unless you opt in to save your results.
help.s1q3: What if I'm not sure how to answer a question?
help.s1a3: Pick the closest match. The recommendation engine works on a profile across all answers, no single question dominates the output.
help.s2q1: How does suppdoc.io pick my supplements?
help.s2a1: Each supplement in our database is tagged with the goals and conditions it addresses. We build a profile from your quiz, score every supplement by how well it matches, apply safety filters (pregnancy, blood thinners, allergies), then pick the highest-scoring options within your budget.
help.s2a2: No. suppdoc.io offers educational guidance based on your inputs and the published evidence. For diagnosis or treatment, please consult a qualified clinician.
help.s2q3: Can I trust the brands you suggest?
help.s2a3: Yes, we curate well-established brands (NOW Foods, Doctor's Best, Sports Research, Thorne, Jarrow, Garden of Life, etc.). All are widely trusted, third-party tested, and have decades of track record.
help.s3q1: Where do I buy the supplements?
help.s3a1: We link to trusted global retailers like iHerb and Amazon, where you can compare brands, prices, and shipping. You buy direct from the retailer, we don't sell or ship anything ourselves.
help.s3q2: Do I have to use a specific retailer?
help.s3a2: Not at all. You're free to buy your stack anywhere. The product information (brand, dose, form) is the same regardless of where you shop.
help.s3a3: If you click through to a retailer from our site and buy something, the retailer pays us a small commission, at no extra cost to you. It's how we fund building suppdoc.io without selling our own products.
help.s4q1: I'm pregnant or nursing, is this safe?
help.s4a1: Our engine automatically removes supplements that aren't recommended during pregnancy (e.g. ashwagandha). However, you should ALWAYS consult your obstetrician before starting any new supplement during pregnancy or lactation.
help.s4q2: I take prescription medications. What should I do?
help.s4a2: Talk to your doctor or pharmacist before starting any new supplement. Several common supplements interact with medications, particularly blood thinners, thyroid medication, and antidepressants.
help.s4a3: We ask about common allergies in the quiz and filter the stack accordingly. Always double-check product labels for trace ingredients before purchasing.
help.ctaSub: Reach us by email, we reply within one business day.

refunds.metaDesc: suppdoc.io's refund and cancellation policy for premium subscriptions, including our 14-day money-back guarantee and how to cancel.
refunds.title: Refund & Cancellation Policy
refunds.intro: This policy explains how billing, cancellations, and refunds work for suppdoc.io premium subscriptions. The free parts of suppdoc.io remain free, this policy applies only to optional paid plans.
refunds.p1: Our order process is conducted by our online reseller **Paddle.com**. Paddle.com is the **Merchant of Record** for all our paid orders. Paddle handles payment processing, billing, applicable taxes, customer payment inquiries, and refunds. A charge for a suppdoc.io subscription will appear on your statement as a Paddle descriptor.
refunds.p2: Premium is offered as a recurring subscription, currently **$9 / month** or **$79 / year**. Subscriptions renew automatically at the end of each billing period until cancelled. You authorise Paddle to charge your payment method for each renewal at the then-current price (we will notify you in advance of any price change).
refunds.p3: We want you to be happy with premium. If you are not satisfied, you may request a **full refund within 14 days** of your initial purchase or of any renewal charge. Approved refunds are returned to your original payment method by Paddle, and your premium access ends when the refund is issued.
refunds.p4: You can **cancel anytime** from your account settings (or via the link in any Paddle billing email). When you cancel, your subscription does not renew again and your premium access continues until the end of the period you have already paid for. We do not provide pro-rated refunds for unused time after the 14-day window, but you keep access through the paid period.
refunds.p5mid: with the email address used at purchase, or reply to your Paddle receipt. We (or Paddle) will process eligible refunds promptly. You can also contact Paddle support directly at
refunds.p6: Refunds outside the 14-day window are at our discretion (for example, a confirmed technical fault that prevented you from using premium). Reach out and we will do our best to make it right.
refunds.p7pre: Questions about billing, cancellations, or refunds:

build.metaTitle: Custom Stack Builder, Design your own supplement ritual | suppdoc.io
build.metaDesc: Build your own supplement stack from 150+ evidence-led ingredients. Live wellness preview, daily ritual timeline, interaction warnings, and one-click checkout at trusted retailers.
build.metaKeywords: custom supplement stack, build supplement stack, supplement stack builder, personalized supplement protocol, supplement routine designer
build.ogDesc: Design your own supplement ritual from 150+ ingredients. Live wellness preview, daily routine, interaction warnings.
build.intro: Pick from {n} evidence-led ingredients. We'll show you the daily ritual, flag interactions, and preview the wellness impact in real time.
build.noMatches: No matches. Try a different search or clear filters.
build.emptyBody: Click any ingredient from the library, or load a quick-start template above.
build.aiHeading: Describe your goals, we'll compose the stack
build.aiPlaceholder: e.g. "I want more energy, better focus, and improved sleep."
build.ex1: I want more energy, better focus, and improved sleep.
build.ex2: I'm vegan and want a foundational stack for longevity.
build.ex3: Help me recover faster from training and reduce joint stiffness.
build.ex4: I'm 45 and starting to feel burnt out, calmer baseline, deeper sleep.
build.aiHint: Plain English. We'll pick 4-8 ingredients within a medium budget.
build.warningCheck: ⚠ Check with a clinician if you have: {warnings}.
build.fineTune: Fine-tune it below, add or remove any ingredient, the stack panel updates live.
build.openAllNote: Opens one tab per product. If your browser blocks them, allow pop-ups for suppdoc.io, or use the per-product buttons below.
build.priceDisclaimer: Prices are approximate and may vary. We may earn a commission on qualifying purchases, at no extra cost to you.
build.toastCapRemove: Stack is at the cap of {max}. Remove one first.
build.toastCap: Stack is at the cap of {max}.
build.toastShareCopied: Share link copied, paste anywhere to preview.
build.tplFoundationDesc: The 3 supplements almost everyone benefits from.
build.tplSleepDesc: Calm the nervous system, deepen restorative sleep.
build.tplGutDesc: Repair the lining, rebalance the microbiome.
build.issOmega: You have both fish-oil and algae omega-3, these overlap. Keep one.
build.issMag: You have {magCount} magnesium forms, most people only need one (glycinate for sleep, threonate for brain).
build.issSerotonin: 5-HTP and L-Tryptophan both raise serotonin, combining is rarely needed and can be excessive.
build.issIronCalcium: Take iron and calcium at least 2 hours apart, calcium blocks iron absorption.
build.issCoq10: CoQ10 and Ubiquinol are the same nutrient (oxidized vs reduced), pick one.
build.issAdaptogens: You're stacking 4+ adaptogens, usually 2 is enough. Consider trimming.
build.issNad: NAD+ precursors (NMN/NR) consume methyl groups, consider adding TMG or B-complex.
build.issSoftCap: Your stack has {count} supplements, most well-designed routines stay under 10. Consider focusing.

audit.metaDesc: Paste your supplements and our free audit flags interactions, redundancies, missing nutrients, and timing issues in seconds, then suggests a cleaner, evidence-led stack. No signup.
audit.metaKeywords: supplement audit, supplement interaction checker, supplement stack analyzer, supplement stack review, supplement optimization, redundant supplements, check supplement interactions
audit.ogTitle: Free Supplement Audit & Interaction Checker, suppdoc.io
audit.ogDesc: Paste your supplements. We flag redundancies, missing nutrients, interactions, and timing issues, free, instant, evidence-led.
audit.intro: Paste what you take today. We'll find what's redundant, missing, risky, or mistimed, then suggest a cleaner version. Add your recent bloodwork for a deeper, lab-aware check. Free, instant, no signup.
audit.inputLabel: Your current supplements (one per line, include dose if you know it)
audit.addLabs: Add recent lab results for a deeper, lab-aware audit
audit.labsHint: we'll cross-check them against your stack (flag conflicts, spot deficiencies)
audit.privacyBody: What you paste isn't stored. Educational use only, not medical advice.
audit.checkInteractionsD: Iron + calcium, NMN without methyl donor, NSAID-like stacking.
audit.checkRedundanciesD: Two omega-3s, CoQ10 + ubiquinol, three magnesiums.
audit.checkMissingD: Foundational gaps you might want to fix.
audit.checkTimingD: What to take morning vs evening, on empty stomach, etc.
audit.checkCostD: Spot waste, same effect for less.
audit.checkEvidenceD: Each pick scored by published research.
audit.emailSub: We'll send your audit plus a short weekly evidence brief. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.
audit.cleanBody: We didn't find any interactions, redundancies, or major gaps. Stay consistent and re-audit if you change anything.
audit.recoHeading: What we'd add to make it complete
audit.unmatched: We couldn't recognize these, likely brand-specific or outside our 200+ ingredient library:
audit.freshBody: Take the quiz or describe your goals in plain English, we'll compose one from scratch.
audit.disclaimer: Educational use only, not medical advice. Always consult a qualified clinician before changing your supplements, especially if you have medical conditions, take prescription medications, or are pregnant or nursing.
audit.faq1a: Yes, paste your current supplements and get an instant, evidence-led audit with no signup. It flags interactions, redundancies, gaps, and timing issues, then suggests a cleaner stack.
audit.faq2q: What does the supplement interaction checker find?
audit.faq2a: It detects pairs that compete for absorption (like iron and calcium), redundant duplicates (like two omega-3 sources or CoQ10 with ubiquinol), blood-thinning combinations to use with caution, and timing improvements, each explained with the evidence.
audit.faq3a: No. suppdoc is educational and evidence-led, not medical advice. Always consult a qualified clinician before changing your supplements, especially if you take prescription medication or are pregnant or nursing.
